title: agrostis phleoides
intro: Agrostis phleoides, also known as red bentgrass, is a type of grass that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis phleoides include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve blood circulation. Agrostis phleoides can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in some herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves, to support overall health and well-being.
